## Summary

- Describe the change and why it belongs in Marvin.

## User-facing Changes

- List CLI, config, output, docs, or workflow changes users should notice.

## Validation

- [ ] `gofmt -l cmd internal`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/marvin`
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-facing behavior changes.

## Review Notes

- Keep this PR focused on one behavior or documentation change.
- Merge with a normal merge commit.
- Do not delete the branch after merge unless the maintainer explicitly asks.
